### What we do

# Capabilities

Looking for advice or access to resources to better serve small businesses? We’re here to help.

#### _HannahBandhanaH,_ Harlem, NY

For more than 20 years, corporations, governments, and philanthropies have hired Next Street to strengthen the small businesses they rely on. We provide end-to-end solutions – powered by our proprietary technology, national networks, and industry expertise – for our clients to propel small businesses in their supply chains and communities.

## Our Solutions

### Solutions for Small Businesses in Your Communities

Insights and resources to support the success of the small businesses you serve

[Learn more](https://nextstreet.com/https://nextstreet.com/solutions-community/)

### Solutions for Small Businesses in Your Supply Chains

Insights and resources to support suppliers and build resilient supply chains

[Learn more](https://nextstreet.com/https://nextstreet.com/solutions-supply-chain)

> The Business Solutions Center is an invaluable resource for any small business in NYC! They go above and beyond to connect business owners to the resources they need. They helped us navigate the city and state WBE application process and provided opportunities for us to highlight our business.

**Rachel Kellner & Mark Libertini, Aigner Chocolate, Queens, NY**

## By the Numbers…

$6.3 billion

Funds redirected to businesses facing barriers to capital and support

0+

Entrepreneurs reached through our small business programs and partners

1,000+

Active relationships with local small business providers across the United States

$10Bn

Procurement contract dollars committed to underserved small suppliers

34

Cities across the US where we developed holistic small business support strategies

With the right support, America’s small business owners will be the engines driving new economic growth across the country.

## Are you ready to create a better future for small business?

[Contact Us](https://nextstreet.com/contact-us/)
